title: Intuition as Irreversible Compression Trace
one_sentence: This module defines intuition as a trace of irreversible compression under a shared no-exit constraint, rather than shared meaning.
core_thesis: There is no shared meaning first; there is a shared no-exit constraint.

core_compression.intuition: marker of trace-dominant basin where further search is no longer worth it
core_compression.no_exit_constraint: rollback cost greatly exceeds update budget
core_compression.compression: many-to-one mapping into bounded internal representation
core_compression.trace: residual constraint left by non-invertible compression
core_compression.NEIL: Input → Compression → No-exit test → Trace fixation → Intuition signal → Next selection/action → re-entry

axioms.A2: Compression becomes non-invertible when rollback cost greatly exceeds update budget.
axioms.A3: Non-invertible compression leaves traces that re-enter as constraints on future transitions.
axioms.A4: Intuition is the marker of trace-dominant basins.
axioms.A5: Different substrates under similar constraints converge to similar basins.

diagnostic_regimes.under_locking: traces too weak or transient; over-search and instability
diagnostic_regimes.over_locking: traces too strong; rigidity and no-exit closure
diagnostic_regimes.adaptive_locking: balanced trace fixation and pruning; fast but revisable decisions

negative_constraints: Do not treat intuition as always reliable.
Classify irreversible compression and trace re-entry dynamics only.
